sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n102819" key="teixokrate/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τειχο-κρᾰτέω</orth>, <sense id="n102819.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">gain possession of a wall</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1620.tlg001:4:2:18" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Polyaen.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.2.18</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
